scope.goal: Migrate three full-report shard/readiness renderers to renderVerificationReportMarkdown while preserving normalized byte-equivalent Markdown output.

parallelProjects.java: recommended parallel; v2176 reads no fresh Java evidence and does not require Java to wait
parallelProjects.miniKv: recommended parallel; v2176 reads no fresh mini-kv evidence and does not require mini-kv to wait

mechanicalRatchets.change: Tightened the renderer census baseline from 214 standardized / 31 unstandardized to 217 standardized / 28 unstandardized, and moved the negative shrink-only gate from max 30 to max 27.
Added normalized byte-equivalence coverage for two shard readiness reports and three representative production shard execution stage profiles.

safetyBoundary.publicOutput: Normalized parity hashes match pre-migration fingerprints; route output keeps the same section shape.
safetyBoundary.sharedRendererRisk: productionShardExecutionReadinessRenderer is shared by 21 stage profiles, so parity covers three representative stages and the existing production shard execution test covers all 21 profiles.
safetyBoundary.stopCondition: If any production shard execution stage changes shape, inspect the renderer section mapping; do not change stage loaders to satisfy renderer parity.
